description: Claude Code shared settings (thin pointer). Bootstrap canonical: repo-root CLAUDE.md (Claude Code auto-load) → CORE_BOOTSTRAP.md (companion) → runtime/core-bootstrap.yaml (executable contract, projected to runtime.db generated_surfaces). User-specific permissions and overrides live in .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored). Do not duplicate obligations / format / enum content here; that lives in the canonical YAML. Hooks below strengthen per-turn obligation visibility (D strategy from archived bootstrap-contract-yaml-migration plan): UserPromptSubmit pre-injects reminder; Stop validates last assistant message contains the required block before allowing stop. Both hooks write diagnostic logs to /tmp/ai-skill-*-hook.log for debugging.

UserPromptSubmit.command:
bash -c 'echo "$(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S) UserPromptSubmit fired" >> /tmp/ai-skill-prompt-hook.log; bootstrap=$(cat /Users/larrylin/Documents/Ai-skill/CORE_BOOTSTRAP.md 2>/dev/null); reminder="[ai-skill per-turn obligation] Final response MUST end with ### Cognitive Mode 報告 block. First-turn ALSO outputs Bootstrap Receipt. Canonical spec: runtime/core-bootstrap.yaml."; combined=$(printf "%s

---
%s" "$reminder" "$bootstrap"); printf "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"UserPromptSubmit\",\"additionalContext\":%s}}" "$(/opt/homebrew/bin/jq -Rs . <<< "$combined")"'
